'''âp-z-j-w''' ('''kapazjewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:essoign|essoign]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:essoign|essoign]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-z-j-w
|-
! Lemma
| kapazjewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipazjewoko|thipazjewoko]] || [[word:jipazjewoko|jipazjewoko]] || [[word:shipazjewoko|shipazjewoko]] || [[word:kipazjewoko|kipazjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupazjewoko|thuthupazjewoko]] || [[word:jujupazjewoko|jujupazjewoko]] || [[word:shushupazjewoko|shushupazjewoko]] || [[word:kukupazjewoko|kukupazjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupazjewoko|thupazjewoko]] || [[word:jupazjewoko|jupazjewoko]] || [[word:shupazjewoko|shupazjewoko]] || [[word:kupazjewoko|kupazjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupazjewoko|thupazjewoko]] || [[word:jupazjewoko|jupazjewoko]] || [[word:shupazjewoko|shupazjewoko]] || [[word:kupazjewoko|kupazjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepazjewoko|thepazjewoko]] || [[word:jepazjewoko|jepazjewoko]] || [[word:shepazjewoko|shepazjewoko]] || [[word:kepazjewoko|kepazjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopazjewoko|thothopazjewoko]] || [[word:jojopazjewoko|jojopazjewoko]] || [[word:shoshopazjewoko|shoshopazjewoko]] || [[word:kokopazjewoko|kokopazjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopazjewoko|thopazjewoko]] || [[word:jopazjewoko|jopazjewoko]] || [[word:shopazjewoko|shopazjewoko]] || [[word:kopazjewoko|kopazjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopazjewoko|thopazjewoko]] || [[word:jopazjewoko|jopazjewoko]] || [[word:shopazjewoko|shopazjewoko]] || [[word:kopazjewoko|kopazjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpazjewoko|thĂŠpazjewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpazjewoko|jĂŠpazjewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpazjewoko|shĂŠpazjewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpazjewoko|kĂŠpazjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapazjewoko|thathapazjewoko]] || [[word:jajapazjewoko|jajapazjewoko]] || [[word:shashapazjewoko|shashapazjewoko]] || [[word:kakapazjewoko|kakapazjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapazjewoko|thapazjewoko]] || [[word:japazjewoko|japazjewoko]] || [[word:shapazjewoko|shapazjewoko]] || [[word:kapazjewoko|kapazjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapazjewoko|thapazjewoko]] || [[word:japazjewoko|japazjewoko]] || [[word:shapazjewoko|shapazjewoko]] || [[word:kapazjewoko|kapazjewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapazjewithi|shapazjewithi]] || [[word:shapazjewiji|shapazjewiji]] || [[word:shapazjewishi|shapazjewishi]] || [[word:shapazjewiki|shapazjewiki]]
